findings.title: Skill body word count outside target range (target: 1,500-2,000)
findings.snippet:
# Refactor Plan -- Generate Refactoring Plans from Analysis

Generate refactoring plans from existing analysis findings...
findings.description: The refactor-plan SKILL.md body contains approximately 1,197 words, below the 1,500-word target minimum. While the skill delegates most work to the refactoring-planner agent, the body could better document the flag-to-behavior mapping inline rather than deferring entirely to references/flag-behavior.md. The critic feedback loop (Phase 2) is well-documented but the edge cases and error handling sections are thin.
findings.recommendation: Expand the critic feedback loop documentation and inline a summary of how each flag affects agent behavior. The references/flag-behavior.md file can retain the full detail, but a condensed version in the body would improve self-sufficiency. Target adding approximately 300 words.

findings.title: Skill body word count outside target range (target: 1,500-2,000)
findings.snippet:
# Scan Security

## Purpose

Analyze the codebase for security vulnerabilities...
findings.description: The scan-security SKILL.md body contains approximately 1,411 words, below the 1,500-word target minimum. The skill covers 11 workflow steps including OWASP top 10 patterns, plugin-mode security, and CVE checks, but several steps are compressed to 3-4 lines. Steps 6 (Path Traversal), 7 (SSRF), and 8 (Logging) would benefit from expanded grep pattern examples.
findings.recommendation: Expand Steps 6-8 with additional grep pattern examples for each language in the stack. The plugin security steps (P1-P4) are also quite terse and could include example grep commands. Target adding approximately 90 words to reach the 1,500-word floor.

findings.title: Skill body word count outside target range (target: 1,500-2,000)
findings.snippet:
# Scan Quality

## Purpose

Evaluate code quality across three sub-areas...
findings.description: The scan-quality SKILL.md body contains approximately 2,329 words, above the 2,000-word target maximum. The skill covers 16 steps spanning code health, tech debt, and performance analysis. While comprehensive, several sections (Steps 11-15 on performance) contain detailed grep patterns that could be extracted to a references/ file.
findings.recommendation: Create a references/ directory and extract the performance-specific grep patterns (Steps 11-15) into references/performance-patterns.md. This would bring the body closer to the 2,000-word target while maintaining progressive disclosure.

findings.title: Skill body exceeds 2,000 words with no references/ directory
findings.snippet:
# Scan Quality

## Purpose

Evaluate code quality across three sub-areas...
findings.description: The scan-quality skill has 2,329 body words but no references/ directory. The skill contains detailed language-specific grep patterns for 16 steps (code health, tech debt, performance) that load into context on every invocation. Performance patterns (Steps 11-15) and deprecated API patterns (Step 8) are reference material that Claude does not need on every activation.
findings.recommendation: Create skills/scan-quality/references/ with at least two files: performance-patterns.md (Steps 11-15 grep patterns) and deprecated-apis.md (Step 8 patterns). Update the SKILL.md body to reference them conditionally: 'Read references/performance-patterns.md when analyzing data access, pagination, memory, rendering, or caching patterns.'

findings.title: Skill body word count outside target range (target: 1,500-2,000)
findings.snippet:
# Analyze Codebase -- Orchestrator

Comprehensive codebase analysis across 4 standard dimensions...
findings.description: The analyze-codebase SKILL.md body contains approximately 2,064 words, slightly above the 2,000-word target maximum. The skill is the main orchestrator and covers a 10-stage pipeline including stack detection, parallel scanning, reconciliation, critic loops, user checkpoints, and planning stages. The body does use progressive disclosure via references/model-resolution.md and references/plugin-mode.md, but the core pipeline description is verbose.
findings.recommendation: Consider extracting the detailed flag descriptions (--dimensions aliases, --model syntax) or the error handling table into a references/ file. Alternatively, compress the Stage 3-5 descriptions which repeat information about model passing. Target reducing by approximately 60-100 words.

findings.title: Large inline content block in scan-manifest-structure SKILL.md
findings.snippet:
```text
# Standard plugin with skills and agents
my-plugin/
...
```
findings.description: The scan-manifest-structure SKILL.md contains a 31-line fenced text block showing acceptable and unacceptable directory structure examples. While just above the 30-line threshold and serving as procedural reference material (not pure reference documentation), it could be a candidate for extraction if the body grows further. Current word count (1,771) is within target range.
findings.recommendation: Monitor body length. If future edits push the word count above 2,000, extract the directory structure examples to references/structure-examples.md. No immediate action needed.
